text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond is quietly preparing for the
Osaka Hai, a race that Kitasan Black will also
compete in.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I'm looking forward to racing Kita, but I can't
allow myself to get too carried away.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I have to ascertain which qualities I must strive
toward in order to become an illustrious runner.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
How can I contribute to the world of
Umamusume? What can I do as an illustrious
runner? These are the things I need to figure out.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
By bringing excitement and smiles to the fans, I
think Kita will become a pillar that supports the
world of Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I hope that by using Kita as a reference, it will
help me discover what it is that I can do...
choice_data_list: An illustrious runner also needs to be strong.
An illustrious runner also needs to be strong.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That's true. I'm not fit for such a title if I lose a
race due to becoming consumed by these
thoughts.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'll claim victories by racing in a manner befitting
an illustrious runner. That's what I need to achieve
first.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The paddock is rife with discussion about Satono
Diamond and Kitasan Black.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
It's Kitasan Black versus Satono Diamond. I can't
believe I get to see them face off again! I hope
they both do great!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
It was a shame when Kitasan Black came in
second at the Osaka Hai last year. I'm sure she's
looking to win it all this time.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: Oh! Look, it's Diamond!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Satonooo! Give it everything you've got!

text_block_list.name: Fan D
text_block_list.text: Kitasaaan! You can win it this time!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I definitely will!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something feels off... Kitasan Black seems
different than usual.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Dia. There's something I wanna say before the
race.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh? What is it?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
My goal is to win every single one of my senior
year races!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: That means I definitely won't be losing today!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Let's have a good race!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black looks so imposing today. I guess I
shouldn't be surprised—she was last year's Star
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I'm in awe. Kitasan Black seems so poised today
that even Satono Diamond is left speechless.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (For just a moment there, I felt intimidated...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(I can't allow my emotions get the better of me!
And yet...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I won't lose!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I know I won't lose!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Right! I'm going to win!
